text: carbs is 6g. but the real story is the context, not the nutrition profile.

on the plus side. has a narrow but legitimate sports use case because the category should recognise context when a use case is actually real. clear real-world role because if a misc item helps or harms behavior, that matters a lot. context tells the real story because that is the whole point of misc.

the drawbacks next. terrible as a casual everyday drink because outside hard training, the sugar is hard to justify. easy to overrate or misuse because this category attracts strong marketing and habits. better replacements often exist because that practical comparison matters.
Sports Drink is D tier. Best treated as an occasional context item, not a nutritional base.
